artifacts.name: low-level-design
artifacts.description: Low-level design for 3D scene rendering with R3F Canvas, lighting, and OrbitControls

summary.work_completed: Created Low-Level Design (LLD) for FR-SCENE-001. The LLD defines component architecture, sequence diagrams, error handling, and security considerations for the 3D scene rendering foundation.
key_findings: R3F Canvas with antialiasing and shadows provides the rendering foundation
OrbitControls configured to free LEFT mouse button for brick placement (critical gotcha)
InstancedMesh per brick type is essential for performance with 500+ bricks
GhostBrick uses useRef to avoid store churn during cursor following
Global WebGL error handler enables automated verification of zero errors

recommended_actions: Review the LLD for completeness and alignment with PRD and Tech Arch
Verify that all design decisions are justified and NFRs addressed
Approve the design or request specific changes
